summary: The reproduction bundle starts the vulnerable standalone helper, stages a synthetic recorded-stream file under /var/www/tmp, and verifies that an unauthenticated HTTP request downloads the file contents.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should return the secret marker stored in /var/www/tmp/teststream-31-May-26-12:00:00.flv through an unauthenticated request to plugin/Live/standAloneFiles/getRecordedFile.php.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned commit 7292129eaee5f609beae103b5cb387d55f17b877, started the vulnerable PHP helper, and returned the exact marker EVOHUNT_SECRET_STREAM_CONTENT through an unauthenticated GET request to plugin/Live/standAloneFiles/getRecordedFile.php.
verification_method: The verification helper stages a known file, requests the helper endpoint without any credentials, and checks that the HTTP 200 response body contains the exact secret marker and the expected video/x-flv response headers.
evidence_produced_by_run: The HTTP response body returned the exact staged marker string EVOHUNT_SECRET_STREAM_CONTENT.
The response headers included HTTP 200 OK and Content-Type: video/x-flv.
The verifier completed without providing any credentials, cookies, or authorization tokens.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit or ref, and mounts that checkout into the container.
